From properties near Hollis Avenue to homes around the historic St. Albans border, we protect the architectural character that makes this neighborhood special.

faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Hollis, Queens?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Hollis typically ranges from $800 to $4,000, depending on the size of your property, the extent of the infestation, and the treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, so you'll know exactly what to expect.

faqs.question: What are signs of termites in my Hollis home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include hollow-sounding wood, visible mud tubes on foundation walls, discarded wings near windows or doors, small holes in drywall, and sagging floors or ceilings. If you notice any of these indicators in your Hollis property, contact us immediately for a professional inspection.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Hollis?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Hollis homes are completed within 1-3 days, depending on the treatment method and severity of infestation. Liquid treatments typically take 4-6 hours, while bait systems may require ongoing monitoring. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite prevention services in Hollis?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive termite prevention programs for Hollis homeowners, including soil treatments, bait station installation, moisture control recommendations, and annual inspections. Preventive treatments are far more affordable than dealing with an active infestation and structural repairs.
